compliance.assurance_rationale: NERC CIP-010-4 R1 Configuration change management — detecting changes outside the approved baseline is the direct control for R1.4 monitoring.
BSI IT-Grundschutz 2023 OPS.1.1.2 Ordered ICT operation — unauthorised change detection is one of the core safeguards listed in the module.
BAIT/KAIT §9 ICT operations management — unauthorised change detection supplies the change-management control evidence BaFin examiners expect.
MAS TRM 2021 §4.1.1 Technology risk governance — unauthorised change detection is listed as a governance KRI.
SOX ITGC change-authorization control — unauthorised change detection is the canonical program-change ITGC tested by SOX auditors to confirm changes were authorised before promotion to production.
